case_title: DOWD BROS. VS. ACADEMY OF CHINESE ARTS ET AL

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOWD BROS. A MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP CO.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOWD BROS. A MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACADEMY OF CHINESE ARTS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1105 STOCKTON STREET, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94133, LEASE FORFEITED, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**
